# Alex Mayhew: Technical Advisor & Systems Architect

> "Atmospheric Engineering" - High-precision, low-latency architecture for modern web development.

## Identity

- Name: Alex Mayhew
- Role: Technical Advisor & Systems Architect
- Location: Remote (Worldwide)
- Contact: alex@alexmayhew.dev
- Website: https://alexmayhew.dev

## Core Capabilities

### System Architecture
Scalable microservices, cloud-native infrastructure, event-driven systems. Design patterns that compound into competitive advantage over 3+ year horizons.

### Performance Engineering
Sub-50ms INP, Core Web Vitals optimization, edge computing. Reduced SaaS dashboard load times from 2.1s to 0.3s serving 100k+ users.

### Legacy Migration
Strategic refactoring from monoliths (ColdFusion, AngularJS, jQuery) to modern stacks. Incremental migration without business disruption.

### AI/ML Integration
LLM deployment, RAG systems, vector databases, fine-tuning pipelines. Built domain-adapted models for cybersecurity and document processing.

## Technical Stack

### Frontend
- Next.js 15 (App Router, Server Components, Server Actions)
- React 19 (Concurrent Features, Suspense)
- TypeScript (Strict mode, Zod validation)
- Tailwind CSS 4, Framer Motion

### Backend
- Node.js, Python/FastAPI, Go
- PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB
- GraphQL, REST APIs, WebSockets
- Prisma ORM, Drizzle

### Infrastructure
- Cloudflare Pages/Workers/R2
- AWS (Lambda, ECS, RDS, S3)
- Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
- Vercel, Railway

### AI/ML
- PyTorch, Transformers, ONNX
- Qdrant, Pinecone (vector databases)
- OpenAI, Anthropic APIs
- LangChain, LlamaIndex

## Proof of Work

### TraceForge
GPU-accelerated image vectorization achieving 337x performance improvement over Inkscape. WebGPU-powered edge detection and path optimization.

### PhotoKeep Pro
AI photo restoration with 28.5dB PSNR quality, 73% cost reduction through edge-optimized inference. Processes 10M+ images monthly.

### PenQWEN
Domain-adapted cybersecurity LLM fine-tuned on penetration testing datasets. Achieves 94% accuracy on OWASP classification tasks.

### Claude Pilot
Enterprise Claude Code manager with session orchestration, context persistence, and multi-agent coordination.

## Services

### Advisory Retainer (Tier 1)
Ongoing strategic guidance: 10-20 hours/month. Architecture reviews, hiring support, vendor evaluation, due diligence preparation.

### Strategic Implementation (Tier 2)
Hands-on architectural work for critical projects. MVP development, infrastructure setup, performance optimization, security hardening.

### Technical Due Diligence (Tier 3)
Comprehensive technical assessment for investors and acquirers. Codebase audit, architecture review, risk identification.

## Blog: AI-Assisted Development Series (12 posts)

Hub guide plus 11 spokes covering the full AI development landscape for CTOs and senior engineers.

- /blog/ai-assisted-development-guide - Hub: comprehensive framework for AI in software development
- /blog/cognitive-debt-ai-teams - Cognitive debt: the hidden cost when teams don't understand AI-generated code
- /blog/metr-paradox-ai-productivity - METR study: experienced devs 19% slower with AI, believed 24% faster
- /blog/production-mcp-servers - Building production MCP servers: what 8,600 community servers got wrong
- /blog/when-not-to-use-ai-coding - 7 task categories where AI coding produces net-negative outcomes
- /blog/ai-technical-debt-bomb - $1.5T projected AI technical debt by 2027, audit checklist and remediation
- /blog/agentic-engineering - How sprint structure, code ownership, and hiring change with AI agents
- /blog/ai-tdd-non-deterministic-code - TDD pattern for AI: human writes failing test, AI implements, human reviews
- /blog/ai-security-red-team-playbook - 7 confirmed AI attack vectors with red team checklist
- /blog/claude-code-vs-cursor-cost-analysis - Total cost of ownership comparison for a 10-person team over 90 days
- /blog/vibe-coding-hangover-recovery - Triage, audit, and remediation for codebases nobody understands
- /blog/hiring-ai-engineers - Interview framework separating real AI competence from resume fluff
- /blog/enterprise-ai-sdlc-blueprint - 5 evaluation gates for enterprise AI coding tool adoption

## Industry Expertise

### SaaS
Multi-tenant architecture, subscription billing (Stripe), feature flags, SOC 2 compliance preparation.

### Fintech
PCI-DSS compliance, real-time trading dashboards, payment integrations, audit logging.

### Healthcare
HIPAA compliance, EHR integrations (Epic, Cerner), PHI handling, clinical workflow optimization.

### Startups
MVP scoping, tech stack selection, hiring support, investor technical due diligence.

## Engagement Model

- Advisory engagements: $2,000-$8,000/month
- MVP projects: $15,000-$50,000
- Full implementations: $50,000-$300,000
- Due diligence: Project-based
